Localization.Description: Password bruteforcing for Microsoft SQL Server accounts

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Password bruteforcing attempts from host {src.host} in application Microsoft SQL Server for account {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.host}. Number of login attempts: {datafield1}.
Successful password bruteforcing locally in application Microsoft SQL Server account for {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.host}. Number of failed login attempts: {datafield1}.
Local password bruteforcing attempts in application Microsoft SQL Server account for {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.host}. Number of login attempts: {datafield1}.
Successful password bruteforcing from host {src.host} in application Microsoft SQL Server for account {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.host}. Number of failed login attempts: {datafield1}.
